title: Cortex XDR - Cloud Enrichment
content:
This playbook is responsible for collecting data from Cortex XDR detector and enriching data for further usage and building the layout.

The playbook collects or enriches the following data:
- Resource enrichment
   - Previous activity seen in the specified region or project
- Account enrichment
- Network enrichment
   - Attacker IP
   - Geolocation
   - ASN

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (CloudIncidentResponse, xsoar-supported).

Use cases: Incident Response.

Inputs — ResolveIP: Determines whether to convert the IP address to a hostname using a DNS query (True/ False).; InternalRange: A list of internal IP ranges to check IP addresses against. \nFor IP Enrichment - Generic v2 playbook..

Outputs — IP: The IP objects.; DBotScore: Indicator, Score, Type, Vendor.; Account: The account object.; IAM: Generic IAM output.; ASNType: Checks for cloud ASNs.; isKnownRegion: Checks if any recent activity was seen in the region.; isKnownProject: Checks if any recent activity was seen in the project.; resourceCount: Involved resource count.; uniqueRegionCount: Involved region distinct count..

Integrations/scripts used: CopyContextToField, If-Then-Else, IsInCidrRanges, Set, ip.

  - Resource enrichment
     - Previous activity seen in the specified region or project
  - Account enrichment
  - Network enrichment
     - Attacker IP
     - Geolocation
     - ASN

        For more information, see the section about permissions here:
        - For Cortex XSOAR 6 see https://docs-cortex.paloaltonetworks.com/r/Cortex-XSOAR/6.x/Cortex-XSOAR-Playbook-Design-Guide/Automations

      scriptName: CopyContextToField
      type: regular
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "36"
    scriptarguments:
      incidentsQuery:
        simple: id:${incident.id}
      listSeparator:
        simple: ','
      sourceContextKey:

      targetIncidentField:
        simple: cloudregionlist
    separatecontext: false

inputs:
- key: ResolveIP
  value:
    simple: "True"
  required: false
  description: Determines whether to convert the IP address to a hostname using a DNS query (True/ False).
  playbookInputQuery:
- key: InternalRange
  value:
    complex:
      root: lists
      accessor: PrivateIPs
      transformers:
      - operator: RegexExtractAll
        args:
          error_if_no_match: {}
          ignore_case: {}
          multi_line: {}
          period_matches_newline: {}
          regex:
            value:
              simple: (\b(?:\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}\b/\d{1,2})
          unpack_matches: {}
      - operator: join
        args:
          separator:
            value:
              simple: ','
  required: false
  description: A list of internal IP ranges to check IP addresses against. \nFor IP Enrichment - Generic v2 playbook.
  playbookInputQuery:
